title: AxSmithing
description: A ViaVersion addon that makes Smithing Tables work in all versions

Source code:[ https://github.com/Artillex-Studios/AxSmithing]('https://github.com/Artillex-Studios/AxInventoryRestore/')

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
[![https://i.imgur.com/TxLSFlx.png](https://i.imgur.com/TxLSFlx.png)]('https://dc.artillex-studios.com/')

<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>
AxSmithing
Smithing tables for all versions.

WHAT IS AXSMITHING?
The plugin gives 1.7-1.15 clients the ability to open smithing tables.

Great Performance
The plugin is very light, it does not cause any lag

Useful
The plugin fixes a major issue for you.

Credibility
The plugin is a ViaVersion addon!

IMPORTANT
AxSmithing won't let older clients on your server, you must download ViaVersion, and optionally ViaBackwards, ViaRewind

CUSTOMIZATION
You can revert to the old 1.16-1.19 smithing table, that doesn't need a Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template

MORE ABOUT AXSMITHING
In 1.20 mojang have added a new UI to the smithing table, and if your 1.16-1.19 server runs ViaBackwards, then 1.20+ players won't be able to open the smithing table, the same thing is also true with ViaVersion on 1.20+ servers and 1.16-1.19 clients.

</details>
